We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 2.11s, d = 21.91m:
t^2 = 2.11 * 2.11:
2.11 * 0.01 = 0.0211
2.11 * 0.10 = 0.2110
2.11 * 2.00 = 4.2200
0.0211 + 0.2110 = 0.2321
0.2321 + 4.2200 = 4.4521
k = 21.91 / 2.11^2 = 21.91 / 4.4521 = 21.910 / 4.452
= 0 + 1 * 21910 / 4452
= 1 + 1 * 17458 / 4452
= 2 + 1 * 13006 / 4452
= 3 + 1 * 8554 / 4452
= 4 + 1 * 4102 / 4452
= 4.0 + 0.1 * 41020 / 4452
= 4.1 + 0.1 * 36568 / 4452
= 4.2 + 0.1 * 32116 / 4452
= 4.3 + 0.1 * 27664 / 4452
= 4.4 + 0.1 * 23212 / 4452
= 4.5 + 0.1 * 18760 / 4452
= 4.6 + 0.1 * 14308 / 4452
= 4.7 + 0.1 * 9856 / 4452
= 4.8 + 0.1 * 5404 / 4452
= 4.9 + 0.1 * 952 / 4452
= 4.90 + 0.01 * 9520 / 4452
= 4.91 + 0.01 * 5068 / 4452
= 4.92 + 0.01 * 616 / 4452
= 4.920 + 0.001 * 6160 / 4452
= 4.921 + 0.001 * 1708 / 4452
= 4.921

t = 1.13s, d = 6.29m:
t^2 = 1.13 * 1.13:
1.13 * 0.03 = 0.0339
1.13 * 0.10 = 0.1130
1.13 * 1.00 = 1.1300
0.0339 + 0.1130 = 0.1469
0.1469 + 1.1300 = 1.2769
k = 6.29 / 1.13^2 = 6.29 / 1.2769 = 6.290 / 1.276
= 0 + 1 * 6290 / 1276
= 1 + 1 * 5014 / 1276
= 2 + 1 * 3738 / 1276
= 3 + 1 * 2462 / 1276
= 4 + 1 * 1186 / 1276
= 4.0 + 0.1 * 11860 / 1276
= 4.1 + 0.1 * 10584 / 1276
= 4.2 + 0.1 * 9308 / 1276
= 4.3 + 0.1 * 8032 / 1276
= 4.4 + 0.1 * 6756 / 1276
= 4.5 + 0.1 * 5480 / 1276
= 4.6 + 0.1 * 4204 / 1276
= 4.7 + 0.1 * 2928 / 1276
= 4.8 + 0.1 * 1652 / 1276
= 4.9 + 0.1 * 376 / 1276
= 4.90 + 0.01 * 3760 / 1276
= 4.91 + 0.01 * 2484 / 1276
= 4.92 + 0.01 * 1208 / 1276
= 4.920 + 0.001 * 12080 / 1276
= 4.921 + 0.001 * 10804 / 1276
= 4.922 + 0.001 * 9528 / 1276

= 4.924 + 0.001 * 6976 / 1276
= 4.925 + 0.001 * 5700 / 1276
= 4.926 + 0.001 * 4424 / 1276
= 4.927 + 0.001 * 3148 / 1276
= 4.928 + 0.001 * 1872 / 1276
= 4.929 + 0.001 * 596 / 1276
= 4.929

t = 1.99s, d = 19.49m:
t^2 = 1.99 * 1.99:
1.99 * 0.09 = 0.1791
1.99 * 0.90 = 1.7910
1.99 * 1.00 = 1.9900
0.1791 + 1.7910 = 1.9701
1.9701 + 1.9900 = 3.9601
k = 19.49 / 1.99^2 = 19.49 / 3.9601 = 19.490 / 3.960
= 0 + 1 * 19490 / 3960
= 1 + 1 * 15530 / 3960
= 2 + 1 * 11570 / 3960
= 3 + 1 * 7610 / 3960
= 4 + 1 * 3650 / 3960
= 4.0 + 0.1 * 36500 / 3960
= 4.1 + 0.1 * 32540 / 3960
= 4.2 + 0.1 * 28580 / 3960
= 4.3 + 0.1 * 24620 / 3960
= 4.4 + 0.1 * 20660 / 3960
= 4.5 + 0.1 * 16700 / 3960
= 4.6 + 0.1 * 12740 / 3960
= 4.7 + 0.1 * 8780 / 3960
= 4.8 + 0.1 * 4820 / 3960
= 4.9 + 0.1 * 860 / 3960
= 4.90 + 0.01 * 8600 / 3960
= 4.91 + 0.01 * 4640 / 3960
= 4.92 + 0.01 * 680 / 3960
= 4.920 + 0.001 * 6800 / 3960
= 4.921 + 0.001 * 2840 / 3960
= 4.921

t = 1.52s, d = 11.37m:
t^2 = 1.52 * 1.52:
1.52 * 0.02 = 0.0304
1.52 * 0.50 = 0.7600
1.52 * 1.00 = 1.5200
0.0304 + 0.7600 = 0.7904
0.7904 + 1.5200 = 2.3104
k = 11.37 / 1.52^2 = 11.37 / 2.3104 = 11.370 / 2.310
= 0 + 1 * 11370 / 2310
= 1 + 1 * 9060 / 2310
= 2 + 1 * 6750 / 2310
= 3 + 1 * 4440 / 2310
= 4 + 1 * 2130 / 2310
= 4.0 + 0.1 * 21300 / 2310
= 4.1 + 0.1 * 18990 / 2310
= 4.2 + 0.1 * 16680 / 2310
= 4.3 + 0.1 * 14370 / 2310
= 4.4 + 0.1 * 12060 / 2310
= 4.5 + 0.1 * 9750 / 2310
= 4.6 + 0.1 * 7440 / 2310
= 4.7 + 0.1 * 5130 / 2310
= 4.8 + 0.1 * 2820 / 2310
= 4.9 + 0.1 * 510 / 2310
= 4.90 + 0.01 * 5100 / 2310
= 4.91 + 0.01 * 2790 / 2310
= 4.92 + 0.01 * 480 / 2310
= 4.920 + 0.001 * 4800 / 2310
= 4.921 + 0.001 * 2490 / 2310
= 4.922 + 0.001 * 180 / 2310
= 4.922

k values: 4.921, 4.929, 4.921, 4.922
k values (sorted): 4.921, 4.921, 4.922, 4.929
The median k is 4.921.

For t = 1.66:
t^2 = 1.66 * 1.66:
1.66 * 0.06 = 0.0996
1.66 * 0.60 = 0.9960
1.66 * 1.00 = 1.6600
0.0996 + 0.9960 = 1.0956
1.0956 + 1.6600 = 2.7556
= 2.7556

d = 4.921 * 2.7556:
4.921 * 0.0006 = 0.0029526
4.921 * 0.0050 = 0.0246050
4.921 * 0.0500 = 0.2460500
4.921 * 0.7000 = 3.4447000
4.921 * 2.0000 = 9.8420000
0.0029526 + 0.0246050 = 0.0275576
0.0275576 + 0.2460500 = 0.2736076
0.2736076 + 3.4447000 = 3.7183076
3.7183076 + 9.8420000 = 13.5603076
= 13.560

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{13.560}
